---
title: "state-estimation Docs"
sidebar: false
toc: false
page-navigation: false
body-classes: "docs-strip-page"
---

## Theory

The [Theory](theory/) section explains the math, frame conventions, and estimator-side assumptions used by the project.

Pages:

- [Conventions](theory/conventions/): frame names, quaternion names, storage order, and sign choices.
- [Supported Input](theory/supported-input/): what the project assumes about the pose, IMU, and GPS-like streams it works with.

Theory pages are organized by subsystem and explain how the estimator works. API details live in Reference.

## Reference

The [Reference](reference/) section covers input formats and public interfaces.

Pages:

- [Input Files](reference/input-files/): filenames, field shapes, units, and ordering rules.
- [C++ API](reference/cpp-api/): [state-estimation](https://github.com/jreich218/state-estimation) public API.
